prompt:
Use the uploaded image as a character reference. A man or woman sitting casually on a medium-sized 3D Earth globe, with the "Aquarius" zodiac constellation displayed above in a Gen Z-style font. Elegant minimalist doodles of "Medan" city emerge from the globe, set against a clean and elegant background with a colorful comic-inspired aesthetic.

Outfit: wearing an anorak jacket, loose black cargo pants, and classic Converse sneakers.

Modern high-fashion style, rough composition, high contrast, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, minimalist poster design, aesthetic, 8K resolution.
